content: Self-Refine’s single-step iterative self-feedback loop and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-backed self-reflection can be combined to create a two-tiered autonomous self-improvement system for LLMs: Self-Refine handles local, task-specific output polishing in the short term, while Reflexion accumulates global, cross-task reflective lessons into persistent memory to guide future Self-Refine iterations. This tiered structure mirrors how humans separate immediate task revision from long-term reflective learning.
